name: domain_certificates
description: Manage domain certificates — let's encrypt: order a certificate, let's encrypt: issue a certificate, let's encrypt: order a certificate renewal. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: auto_renew
parameters.description: Enable the auto-renewal of the certificate

parameters.name: signature_algorithm
parameters.description: Optional string to determine the signature algorithm to be used. Either `ECDSA` or `RSA`
